name: Mushroom Satay (Satay Het Hom)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each mushroom into a rough circle, then spiral towards the center to form one long strip.
2. Set aside.
3. THE MARINADE: In a mortar, pound galangal, lemon grass, kaffir lime leaf, coriander roots, and garlic until a paste forms. Transfer to a mixing bowl and stir in all other ingredients. Mix well.
4. Place mushroom strips into the marinade and leave for at least 30 minutes.
5. PEANUT SAUCE: In a wok or frying pan/skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add curry paste and fry briefly until it blends with the oil. Add coconut milk and stir until a rich red color appears. Lower the heat and add remaining ingredients, stirring constantly until a thick sauce forms.
6. Remove from heat and set aside.
7. Take mushroom strips out of the marinade and thread onto satay sticks.
8. Grill/broil until cooked through.
9. Serve with peanut sauce and fresh cucumber pickle. Toast triangles may also be served for extra sauce absorption.
